name_en: YSL Classic Legend Fashion Meets Romance❓ The original YSL leather texture embodies this attribute. It is hard to describe how charming it is; it has a magic that captivates you. It is a basic essential in many women's wardrobes, allowing you to create a simple yet textured look with plenty of accents💋Size: 30 Model 26821
